title: Highlighter With Optimisation
description: This project is a updated version of highlighter mod by themasterkitty but with a few added features
body:
This Project is a updated version with higher compatibility of [highligher](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlighter) mod by [themasterkitty](https://modrinth.com/user/themasterkitty). 

This mod has a background colour options for various items and is changable using the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). 

It also has a performance mod that limits hud framerate [Note That this mod was developed when exordium released for 1.21.11] 
![New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b11d2fa64bb9a03dc8514b1faad6f2d556ee9c.png)


<details>
<summary>Example Pictures[Old Versions]</summary>

<details>
<summary>First Version!</summary>

![Old ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e80f3d15ad4e8faf733fc44f74d5b512189b0849.png)
</details>


</details>



The next version is under development. Various Other Items and enchants will be added!

Enjoy Your Gameplay!

## CREDITS
MOD PURELY INSPIRED BY [highligher](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlighter) developed by [themasterkitty](https://modrinth.com/user/themasterkitty)
